title: 💻 Claude Code Best Practices: Planning, Context Transfer, TDD
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Best Practices: Planning, Context Transfer, TDD. Use plan mode, CLAUDE.md files, and test-driven development to make the most of Claude's context window. ### Using Claude Code plan mode. Each red-to-green cycle gives Claude unambiguous feedback, and it can iterate through the entire suite without human intervention, making test-driven development (TDD) the single strongest pattern for working with agentic coding tools. **The highest-impact practices are planning before implementation (annotation cycles or plan mode), keeping your `CLAUDE.md` under 150 instructions with progressive disclosure, managing context by clearing sessions at 60% capacity, using hooks for deterministic safety enforcement, and writing tests before implementation so Claude has an external oracle to verify against.**. Learn how to use Claude Code’s Plan Mode to explore your codebase in read-only mode, surface questions, and review structured plans for multi-file changes. Learn how hook-based automation works and get started using Claude Code hooks to automate coding tasks like testing, formatting, and receiving notifications.

title: 💻 Claude Code best practices for enterprise teams - Portkey
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

And with either approach, there's no native way to isolate teams so one group's runaway session doesn't eat into another's capacity, apply guardrails to Claude Code's inputs and outputs, load balance across providers or set up automatic failover, switch between Anthropic, Bedrock, and Vertex AI without reconfiguring every developer's machine, or get a single pane of glass showing cost, usage, and performance across the entire org. It gives you the credential hierarchy, budget controls, rate limits, request logging, metadata tagging, provider fallbacks, guardrails, and multi-provider routing described above, all without changing how developers use Claude Code. Once traffic flows through Portkey, everything described in this guide is available out of the box: scoped API keys with budget and rate limits, full request logs with metadata and cost attribution, composable routing configs for fallbacks and load balancing, guardrail integrations with partners like AWS Bedrock Guardrails and Azure Content Safety, and provider flexibility without workflow changes.

title: 💻 Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide - SmartScope
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Batch Processing Complete Guide: /batch Command and Headless Mode in Practice¶. The `/batch` command in Claude Code shines when you need to apply the same transformation across hundreds of files. | Aspect | /batch Command | Headless Mode (claude -p) |. `/batch` is a slash command executed within an interactive Claude Code session1. ## Headless Mode (claude -p): CI/CD and Script Integration¶. claude -p "Summarize this file" --output-format text. claude -p "Process this large dataset" --output-format stream-json`. claude -p "Analyze this code" --output-format json | jq -r '.result'. claude -p "Summarize this file" --output-format json | jq '.usage'`. session_id=$(claude -p "Start review" --output-format json \. claude -p "Continue the review" --resume "$session_id"`. claude -p "Review the code" \. - claude -p "Analyze maintainability issues" --output-format json. - claude -p "Check for performance bottlenecks" --output-format json. Claude Code's batch processing is built on two pillars: `/batch` and headless mode (`claude -p`). Claude Code v2.1.63 Release Notes — `/batch` and `/simplify` were introduced in this version.

title: 💻 Batch Documentation Operations: Claude Code Skill for Bulk Docs
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

Discover MCP servers that connect MCP clients like Claude and Cursor to your favorite tools. Browse the MCP Market to get started. #### Browse. #### Rankings. # Batch Documentation Operations. Manages batch operations on multiple documentation files using pattern matching and parallel execution. Acts as a high-level director for managing large sets of documentation. This skill efficiently handles batch operations like writing, validating, and auditing across numerous files identified by wildcard patterns. It orchestrates tasks by delegating to a single-document manager, executing them in parallel for speed while using file locking to prevent conflicts. Safety is paramount, with built-in previews and user confirmation for destructive actions, comprehensive progress reporting, and graceful handling of partial failures. ## Key Features. ## Use Cases. `npx skillfish add fractary/claude-plugins docs-director-skill`. For use in Claude.ai and ChatGPT. ### Related MCPs.
